'''Aaren Larker''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Samarian]] who served as the [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] of [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
Following the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] rise, a resistance began on [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]] in [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]]. Aaren sympathized with them, and he secretly gave permission to [[Astri Oddo]] to sabotage the computer systems that control the city.<ref name="LOTJATW" />

[[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] asked [[Ferus Olin]] to solve the problem, but tactics like this and others implemented by Bog Divinian, took him out of office when a call for a [[Vote of No Confidence/Legends|vote of no-confidence]] was made against him.<ref name="LOTJATW" />

Aaren Larker went to prison and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a guard the first day there.<ref name="LOTJROTDS" />
